data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation/Addition of K
proline oxidation to pyroglutamic acid/Tryptophan oxidation to oxolactone/aldehyde and ketone modifications
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Bruker Daltonics SERVA-ICPL(TM) quantification chemistry, +10 Da form

project.title: Proteomics characterization of purified SARS-CoV-2 viral particles.
project.projectDescription: Shotgun proteomics characterization of purified SARS-CoV-2 viral particles.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Proteins were extracted from lyophilized digestive glands.  Protein samples were loaded on a SDS-PAGE for a short migration, excised from a single polyacrylamide band, treated with chemical reagents for fixing the cysteine modification or untreated, digested by trypsin, and the resulting peptides were analyzed by Q-Exactive HF tandem mass spectrometry.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were analyzed by MASCOT, the results were then parsed, spectral counts were extracted and compared.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: CEA-Marcoule, ProGénoMIX platform, DRF-Li2D, 30207 Bagnols-sur-Cèze, France
labPIs.name: Jean Armengaud

references.referenceLine: Gallais F, Pible O, Gaillard JC, Debroas S, Batina H, Ruat S, Sandron F, Delafoy D, Gerber Z, Olaso R, Gas F, Bellanger L, Deleuze JF, Grenga L, Armengaud J. Heterogeneity of SARS-CoV-2 virus produced in cell culture revealed by shotgun proteomics and supported by genome sequencing. Anal Bioanal Chem. 2021

Characteristics[CellLine]: Vero E6 cells (Vero 76 – clone E6, ATCC CLR-1586, American Type Culture Collection)
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: in-gel trypsin proteolysis with Trypsin Gold (Promega)
Characteristics[Modification]: static modification of cysteine into carbamidomethylated cysteine
Characteristics[SamplingTime]: Viruses were harvested at 3 days post-infection (dpi).
Characteristics[PooledSample]: pooled as a single production batch.
Comment[Instrument]: Q-Exactive HF tandem mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher)
Comment[FlowRateChromatogram]: The flow rate was set at 0.2 μL/min
Comment[Separation]: resolved on a nanoscale Acclaim PepMap 100 C18 column (3 μm, 100 Å, 75 μm id × 50 cm)
